response:
Write an email to [Recipient Name], thanking him for his helpful and detailed response. Let him know that I believe there is a misunderstanding regarding our current machine vision setup. Our device is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor on this device is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor.

I have attached the technical data to this email. Please refer to the "FL3-U3-Technical-Reference" PDF file, specifically page 18, for the detailed datasheet. For Quantum Efficiency information, please check the "FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging" PDF file on page 13.

I will study the files and manuals more carefully and inform you of my findings.
